slogan: Shop Smart. Save More. Give Back.
howItWorksDescription: The stores pay us a small commission when you shop through our links. You pay nothing extra. We share what they give us with charity every month.
howItWorksDescription2: Tap below — Amazon opens via affiliate link. Your purchase supports charity at no extra cost to you.
asAnAmazonAssociateIEarnFromQualifyingPu: As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases.
opensInExternalBrowserNotWebView: Opens in external browser - NOT WebView
shareMessageDescription: I use CartForGood to shop at Amazon, Walmart and more. A portion goes to charity automatically. November is Feeding America. December is Toys for Tots. Free to download. CartForGood.com
